segments.speaker: 题目15/16
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I just heard that the art store in the mall is going out of business. Oh no, I get my painting supplies for my senior art project there. I know. That's why I came looking for you. What will you do now? Well, I have a couple of options. I could get them online, or I can go to the store in Portersville, ten miles away. It seems to me like you'd want to buy that kind of stuff in person. It looks like I'll be making regular trips to Portersville.
